visualizerParams.title: Binary to Decimal Conversion
visualizerParams.description: Convert a binary string representation of a number into its decimal integer equivalent.
visualizerParams.ghostCode:
def bin_to_dec(s):
    s = s.strip().replace("0b", "")
    neg = s.startswith("-")
    if neg: s = s[1:]
    res = 0
    for char in s:
        res = res * 2 + int(char)
    return -res if neg else res

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(f"'101': {bin_to_dec('101')}")
    print(f"'-11': {bin_to_dec('-11')}")
visualizerParams.finalCode:
def bin_to_dec(s):
    s = s.strip().replace("0b", "")
    neg = s.startswith("-")
    if neg: s = s[1:]
    res = 0
    for char in s:
        res = res * 2 + int(char)
    return -res if neg else res

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(f"'101': {bin_to_dec('101')}")
    print(f"'-11': {bin_to_dec('-11')}")
